caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Choppy Seas for Barbados Today
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados (Bridgetown) is experiencing heavy rain with 88% rain probability, easterly winds near 16 kt and seas to 6.4 ft with an ESE swell period of 8 s. I expect reduced visibility and choppy harbor conditions; with Grenada (St. George's) seeing similar conditions and winds near 15 kt, I recommend mariners and port operators exercise routine caution.

mediterranean.headline: Choppy Seas Near Mykonos with 21 kt Northeasterlies
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northeasterly winds around 21 kt with seas to 4.5 ft and a NE swell period of 6 s; rain is less than 10% rain probability. I recommend mariners prepare for short, choppy conditions near Mykonos while Istanbul remains light with about 10 kt winds and generally calmer seas.
